approved.description: True to approve the pending action; False to reject it.
approved.title: Approved

amended_fields.title: Amended Fields

error_message.title: Error Message

info.description: LangGraph ReAct agent that investigates STP failures, diagnoses the root cause, and (with operator approval) registers missing SSIs.
info.title: STP Exception Triage Agent

post.description: Reset all domain data to initial seed state (preserves triage history).
Idempotent seed — inserts initial data only if tables are empty.

patch.description: BO approval finalises the event (Done). AMEND: activates the new trade version with workflow_status=Initial. CANCEL: sets the trade workflow_status to Cancelled. BO rejection cancels the event and reverts the trade status.
patch.summary: BO approve or reject an event

patch.description: FO approval transitions the event to FoValidated (ready for BO review). FO rejection cancels the event and reverts the trade status.
patch.summary: FO approve or reject an event

parameters.description: 完全一致フィルタ (e.g. FoAgentToCheck)
parameters.name: workflow_status

schema.description: 完全一致フィルタ (e.g. FoAgentToCheck)
schema.title: Workflow Status

post.description:
Create a new trade and trigger FoCheck workflow.

``trade_id`` is assigned by the server at insert time (TRD-001 style sequence).
Run BoCheck rules and advance workflow_status to BoValidated or BoAgentToCheck.

Launches the BoAgent ReAct loop to investigate BoCheck failures for the given trade. Returns COMPLETED with a diagnosis, or PENDING_APPROVAL with a run_id when the agent needs operator approval (e.g. register SSI, reactivate counterparty).
post.summary: Start BO triage for a trade

post.description: Resumes a BO triage run waiting for operator approval. Set approved=true to allow the pending action, or approved=false to skip it.
post.summary: Resume a PENDING_APPROVAL BO triage run

post.description: Creates an Amend or Cancel event for a trade. AMEND also creates a new pending trade version with the amended field values. The event starts in FoUserToValidate status awaiting FO approval.
post.summary: Create a new Amend or Cancel event

post.description: Run FoCheck rules and advance workflow_status to FoValidated or FoAgentToCheck.

Launches the FoAgent ReAct loop to investigate FoCheck failures for the given trade. Returns COMPLETED with a diagnosis, or PENDING_APPROVAL with a run_id when the agent needs operator approval (e.g. amend trade data, cancel trade).
post.summary: Start FO triage for a trade

post.description: Resumes a FO triage run waiting for operator approval. Set approved=true to allow the pending action, or approved=false to skip it.
post.summary: Resume a PENDING_APPROVAL FO triage run

post.description: Approve a trade that was escalated from agent triage to a human operator.

get.description: Returns the most recent FO/BO triage runs stored in the database (newest first).
